title: Allahabad HC orders ₹8 lakh compensation for loss of unborn child after pregnant woman dies in train accident
description: The Allahabad High Court has ordered the Indian Railways to pay ₹8 lakhs as compensation for the death of a foetus who was in the womb of a pregnant woman who died while boarding a train in 2018 [Shri Sukhnandan v Union of India].A Railway Claims Tribunal in 2025 had ordered a compensation of ₹8 lakhs for the death of the woman, who was set to travel aboard the Marudhar Express from Barabanki to Bandikul Railway Station.
